description: Crypto market intelligence, evidence, watchlists, feedback, and paid x402 SKU routing.
name: io.github.agenticsrclab/tradeos-public-intel-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional TradeOS public intelligence API base URL.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional public-intel app key for attribution and quota confidence.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_PUBLIC_INTEL_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional account token for user-owned watchlist tools.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_ACCOUNT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional TradeOS x402 gateway base URL.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_X402_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional stable agent or host identifier used for x402 attribution.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_X402_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional one-time buyer-signed x402 payment header for explicit paid calls. Do not use for private keys.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_X402_PAYMENT_HEADER

environmentVariables.description: Optional buyer wallet address sent with explicit paid x402 calls.
environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_X402_WALLET_ADDRESS

title: TradeOS Public Intelligence
